description_long: This is a male adult figure dressed in urban tactical attire, featuring a fitted long-sleeve shirt with rolled-up sleeves, a patterned scarf around the neck, and fingerless gloves. He wears dark jeans with a holster strapped to his right thigh and a utility belt, suggesting readiness for action or patrol. The figure is accessorized with a pair of sunglasses and a rugged backpack, enhancing his prepared and vigilant appearance. His boots are sturdy and suitable for walking on various urban surfaces. The overall build is athletic, and the posture is upright and alert. The clothing and accessories indicate a blend of practicality and style, suitable for a modern city environment.
description: An athletic male adult in tactical urban attire with a scarf, gloves, sunglasses, and utility accessories, standing upright and alert. He wears fitted clothing, a holster, and a backpack, ready for action in a city setting.
description_view_0: Front view shows the scarf, sunglasses, gloves, holster, and utility belt clearly, with arms slightly outstretched.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the scarf, holster, backpack, and the rolled-up sleeve detail.
description_view_2: Back view reveals the full backpack, harness straps, and the back of the holster and belt.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the holster more prominently and the side profile of the gloves and boots.
attribute_clothing_type: tactical long-sleeve shirt, jeans, scarf, fingerless gloves, utility belt, holster, backpack, sunglasses
